title: Expecting empty properties to be returned as null values when creating a BOOK
gherkin:
When the user creates a "BOOK" "F1 in Numbers" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | title | Living the Supercar Dream |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key | value |
  | title | Living the Supercar Dream |
  | author | |
  | publisher | |
  | year_of_publication | |
  | isbn | |
  | pages | |
  | language | |
